agent_policy.approval_description: Run ephemeral document split? This triggers backend processing.

chunk_size.title: Chunk Size
chunk_size.description: The size of each chunk in tokens. If None, return a single chunk with the full extraction output.

chunk_overlap.title: Chunk Overlap
chunk_overlap.description: The overlap between chunks in tokens. If None, use the default overlap for the chunker.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.
project_id.title: Project Id

extractor_config_id.description: The unique identifier of the extractor configuration.
extractor_config_id.title: Extractor Config Id

document_id.description: The unique identifier of the document.
document_id.title: Document Id
